2606.16842.title: Beyond Models: Reflections on Engineering AI-enabled Systems in a Project-Based Course
2606.16842.paper_summary: Teaching Software Engineering for AI-enabled systems entails addressing the integration of AI components within full-scale software architectures under realistic constraints. While machine learning courses emphasize model development, students often lack experience in architectural design, deployment, and monitoring of AI-enabled systems. Empirical evaluations of such system-oriented AI courses remain limited. This paper reflects on the design and implementation of a project-based master's-level course titled AI Algorithms: Theory and Engineering, at the University of Bremen, in which students developed a movie recommendation system while making architectural design decisions to address challenges related to scalability, deployment, and evolving requirements. We conducted a mixed-methods study combining analyses of student submissions and questionnaire responses to investigate integration challenges, learning outcomes, and opportunities for improvement. Our results indicate persistent difficulties in early architectural decisions, heterogeneous ML integration, evolving requirements, and data management, largely due to uneven ML and software engineering expertise. From the educator's perspective, the course fostered system-level reasoning and strengthened awareness of data-centric ML practices in AI-enabled systems.
2606.16842.paper_summary_zh: 教授針對 AI 驅動系統的軟體工程涉及在現實約束下處理 AI 元件在全規模軟體架構中的整合。雖然機器學習課程強調模型開發，但學生通常缺乏在 AI 驅動系統的架構設計、部署和監控方面的經驗。針對這類系統導向的 AI 課程的實證評估仍然有限。本文反思了在不來梅大學設計和實施的名為 AI 算法：理論與工程的專案導向碩士課程，在該課程中，學生們開發了一個電影推薦系統，同時做出架構設計決策，以應對與可擴展性、部署和不斷變化的需求相關的挑戰。我們進行了一項混合方法研究，結合了對學生提交作品和問卷回應的分析，以調查整合挑戰、學習成果和改進機會。我們的結果顯示，在早期架構決策、異質機器學習整合、變化的需求和數據管理方面持續存在困難，這主要是由於機器學習和軟體工程專業知識的不均衡。從教育者的角度來看，該課程促進了系統層級的推理，並增強了對 AI 驅動系統中以數據為中心的機器學習實踐的認識。
2606.16842.author: Amir Mashmool et.al.
2606.16842.authors: Amir Mashmool, Kishan Ravindra Sawant, Mojtaba Shahin, Nico Hochgeschwender, Rainer Koschke
